panels.description: This is original billing price without discount of this NodePool.
panels.title: Node spent yesterday

panels.description: if there is "No data", please wait for at least two days's data.

targets.expr: abs((sum(max($cost_measure{node_pool_id=~"$NodePoolId", product_code="ecs"} offset 1d) by (product_code, instance_id)) - abs(sum(max($cost_measure{node_pool_id=~"$NodePoolId", product_code="ecs"} offset 2d) by (product_code, instance_id))))) / abs(sum(max($cost_measure{node_pool_id=~"$NodePoolId", product_code="ecs"} offset 2d) by (product_code, instance_id)))

panels.title: Node Pool Node Spending Day Ring Ratio

panels.description:
The "Pod Cost Per Core" is estimated by compute resource of the cluster. Which is calculated by:
 
Σ(Pod Request/Node Capacity)*EachNodePrice / Node Price

Warning:
1. This is a estimate data by compute resource.
2. If there is "No Data", please wait for at least one hour.

targets.legendFormat: Unit nuclear hour price per hour

panels.title: Unit price per core of the cluster

panels.description:
This billing data is related to the cluster. This is original compute resource billing price without discount.

Cost Ratio = This NodePool Cost / This Cluster Cost

targets.expr:
abs(sum(max($cost_measure{node_pool_id=~"$NodePoolId", product_code="ecs"}) by (product_code, instance_id))) 
/ 
abs(sum(max($cost_measure{}) by (product_code, instance_id)))
